notes: Ultrasonic fogger sold under the INKBIRDPLUS sub-brand. Manufacturer spec page states 300 ml/h max mist output; some retailer listings claim 380 ml/h (unverified discrepancy). 12 hours stated runtime applies at maximum mist level — minimum-output runtime unknown. Extendable hose (25.2–68.5 inches) and 2 suction cups included. No built-in humidity control; requires external outlet-switching controller for automated RH management. Officially bundled with Inkbird IHC-200 series controllers. Older variant also listed on Amazon.de under ASIN B09NNC4CXZ. Power wattage not stated on manufacturer page.
